---
title: '2011 is coming…'
date: '2010-02-20T21:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '578144555079037084'
blogger_filename: '/2010/02/2011-is-coming.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<span xmlns=''><p>2010 is nearly 2/12<sup>th</sup>'s over. Are you getting closer and closer to the plans God has placed in your heart this year? Or are you finding that you are already distracted or discouraged. This is a reminder… Man of God… Get on Track!<br /></p><p><br /> </p><p><br />			</p><p><br /> </p><p><br /> </p></span>
